mechanism_summary: I2S substitutes the 4-byte 'CFF2' table-tag literal from intercepted CMP operands; VP gradient preserves seeds making incremental progress toward a sanitizable CFF2 top-dict; only their union clears both tag and header stages within budget.
one_line: I2S plants CFF2 tag; VP gradient scaffolds multi-byte header validation

mechanism_summary: I2S plants the small equation-type integer constants (0–4) into the single pCAL type byte; VP gradient navigates upstream chunk and CRC gates to reach the pCAL handler; only vpc combining both avoids the ARBITRARY+mismatched-nparams early-return.
one_line: I2S lands equation-type byte; VP gradient reaches pCAL handler

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutes both the 9-byte '<![CDATA[' opener and the 3-byte ']]>' terminator from CMP operands; VP gradient retains partial-prefix progress through the byte-equality cascade gating CDATA state entry; neither technique alone suffices.
one_line: I2S supplies CDATA literals; VP gradient holds partial cascade progress
